> **References**
> - [Example Workflow for Adding a Package](https://github.com/rancher/partner-charts-ci?tab=readme-ov-file#example-workflow-for-adding-a-package)
> - [How do I verify my pull request is correct?](https://github.com/rancher/partner-charts#how-do-i-verify-my-pull-request-is-correct)


## Checklist

| Check | Expected | Details |
|---|---|---|
| `.tgz` archive | `assets/<vendor>/<chartname>-<version>.tgz` | [How do I verify my pull request is correct?](https://github.com/rancher/partner-charts#how-do-i-verify-my-pull-request-is-correct) |
| Icon | `assets/icons/<chartname>.<ext>` | [How do I verify my pull request is correct?](https://github.com/rancher/partner-charts#how-do-i-verify-my-pull-request-is-correct) · [How do I change the icon?](https://github.com/rancher/partner-charts#how-do-i-change-the-icon-associated-with-my-helm-chart) |
| Chart source | `charts/<vendor>/<chart>/<version>/` directory | Generated by running `scripts/pull-scripts` then `PACKAGE=<vendor>/<chart> bin/partner-charts-ci update`. [Reference](https://github.com/rancher/partner-charts-ci?tab=readme-ov-file#4-run-partner-charts-ci-update) |
| Chart.yaml | `charts/<vendor>/<chart>/<version>/Chart.yaml` | Must contain `catalog.cattle.io/*` annotations. [How do I verify my pull request is correct?](https://github.com/rancher/partner-charts#how-do-i-verify-my-pull-request-is-correct) |
| Package definition | `packages/<vendor>/<chart>/upstream.yaml` | Present and configured correctly. [Reference](https://github.com/rancher/partner-charts-ci?tab=readme-ov-file#upstreamyaml) |
| App readme | `packages/<vendor>/<chart>/overlay/app-readme.md` | Present, 1-2 paragraphs. [Reference](https://github.com/rancher/partner-charts-ci?tab=readme-ov-file#app-readmemd) |
| Single Package | Only files for one `<vendor>/<chart>` touched | PRs touching multiple packages will be rejected. [Reference](https://github.com/rancher/partner-charts#how-do-i-add-my-project-to-this-repository) |
| Index updated | `index.yaml` has additions | Generated by the tool. Must not have the `generated:` timestamp modified. [How do I verify my pull request is correct?](https://github.com/rancher/partner-charts#how-do-i-verify-my-pull-request-is-correct) |
| Not manually edited | `charts/` and `assets/` were not manually edited | These are generated files. Always delete and regenerate them by re-running `bin/partner-charts-ci update`. [Reference](https://github.com/rancher/partner-charts-ci?tab=readme-ov-file#4-run-partner-charts-ci-update) |
